calibration_notes: My recent BEARISH calls on SPY/QQQ have been correct when VIX >25 and oil prices spiking, but I've been wrong on IWM/TSLA when they showed relative strength despite broader weakness. For tickers I previously missed: IWM showed resilience despite my bearish view - now weighing sector rotation signals more heavily; TSLA's ability to hold $390+ despite market pressure suggests strong support I previously ignored.
